title: ballota acuta var. hispida
intro: Ballota acuta var. hispida, also known as the prickly ballota, is a variety of the Ballota acuta plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Ballota acuta var. hispida include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and cramps, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
